# SkillNest — Smart Digital Skills

> SkillNest is India's premier practical, project-based educational platform offering live online computer, coding, and AI classes for school students (primarily Class 6–8) in India. The curriculum replaces passive screen time with real-world skills like MS Office, Coding Program, AI tools, and cyber safety.

---

## Entity Mappings (Knowledge Graph)

- **Subject Entity:** SkillNest (Alternative name: Smart Digital Skills)
- **Founder & Coordinating Educator:** Aanandita Uplopwar
- **Headquarters Location:** Durg, Bhilai Nagar, Chhattisgarh, India
- **Target Audience:** Middle School Students (Class 6–8 / Ages 10–14)
- **Pedagogy:** 100% Practical, Project-Based, NEP 2020-Aligned Curriculum
- **Core Skill Competencies:** MS Word, MS Excel, MS PowerPoint, Touch Typing, Cyber Safety, block-coding (Scratch), AI Prompting.

---

## Pillar Pages (Priority: 1.0)

- [Home](https://skillnest.co.in/): Primary introduction to SkillNest, pedagogy, curriculum highlights, free demo booking, and batch enrollment.
- [Computer & AI Classes](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/computer-basics/): Core curriculum details for computer literacy, typing, office tools, and AI basics.
- [Coding Classes](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/coding/): Scratch programming and game development curriculum.
- [Summer Course for Kids](https://skillnest.co.in/programs/summer-camp/): Special 6-week intensive summer bootcamp for school students.
- [AI & Coding Classes Near Me](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/ai-coding-classes-near-me/): Search intent landing page targeting major metropolitan city clusters in India.

---

## Digital Skills by Age Group (Priority: 0.85)

SkillNest offers age-differentiated curriculum designed for specific developmental stages:

- [Age Groups Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/age-groups/): Comprehensive guide to choosing the right digital skills program based on your child's age, learning readiness, and grade level.
- [Ages 8–10 Digital Skills](https://skillnest.co.in/age-groups/ages-8-10/): Computer Basics, Typing Skills, Scratch Visual Coding, Digital Safety — foundational literacy for young learners in Class 3–5.
- [Ages 11–13 Digital Skills](https://skillnest.co.in/age-groups/ages-11-13/): AI Tools, Canva Design, Excel Skills, Cyber Safety — practical digital competency for Class 6–8 students.
- [Ages 14–16 Digital Skills](https://skillnest.co.in/age-groups/ages-14-16/): AI Productivity, Advanced Excel, Data Handling, Career Readiness — future-ready skills for Class 9–10 students.

**Topics covered:** Digital Skills by Age Group, Age-Appropriate Computer Education India, Best Age to Learn Coding, Digital Literacy for Children, Computer Classes for Kids by Grade

---

## Digital Skills Roadmaps & Learning Paths (Priority: 0.85)

SkillNest provides structured learning pathways that align topic clusters into continuous competency roadmaps:

- [Learning Paths Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/learning-paths/): Structured curriculum progression roadmap to shift children from complete beginners to advanced tech creators.
- [Beginner Digital Skills Path](https://skillnest.co.in/learning-paths/beginner-digital-skills/): Ideal for Ages 8–10 (Class 3–5). Focuses on Computer Basics, typing, internet navigation, cyber safety, and foundational Coding Program.
- [Intermediate Digital Skills Path](https://skillnest.co.in/learning-paths/intermediate-digital-skills/): Ideal for Ages 11–13 (Class 6–8). Covers Canva design, presentations, Excel spreadsheets, and safe AI tool interactions.
- [Advanced Digital Skills Path](https://skillnest.co.in/learning-paths/advanced-digital-skills/): Ideal for Ages 14–16 (Class 9–10). Deep dives into Advanced Excel, prompt engineering, data analysis, and professional portfolio building.

**Topics covered:** Learning Paths, Digital Skills Roadmaps, Student Learning Progression, AI Skills Education, Digital Literacy, Computer Basics, Coding Pathways, Future Ready Tech Portfolio

---

## Practical Computer & Coding Courses (Priority: 0.85)

SkillNest provides targeted, live, project-based courses for middle school students:

- [Courses Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/): Central discovery hub listing all active cohorts, curriculum highlights, parent feedback, and booking options.
- [Computer Basics](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/computer-basics/): Foundational digital literacy covering hardware inputs, folder structures, shortcuts, and safe web navigation.
- [Typing Course](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/typing-course/): Touch typing training that builds muscle memory, finger posture, and targets WPM speeds of 40+.
- [Coding Course](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/coding-course/): Interactive logic programming utilizing Scratch blocks to teach variables, coordinate maps, loops, and game physics.
- [AI Classes for Kids](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/ai-classes-for-kids/): Safe introduction to AI prompting structures, data classification, graphics generation, and cyber safety bounds.
- [Excel Course](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/excel-course/): Spreadsheet data grids, basic arithmetic calculations, average formulas, and automatic math chart styling.
- [PowerPoint Course](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/powerpoint-course/): Slide master setups, visual text templates, transition speeds, and outline cards for public presentations.
- [Internet Safety Course](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/internet-safety-course/): Cyber safety hygiene including password complexity, phishing email tricks, browser cookies, and location trackers.
- [Productivity Tools Course](https://skillnest.co.in/courses/productivity-tools-course/): Cloud workspaces management, text margins layouts, index pages in Google Workspace, and Canva graphic designs.

**Topics covered:** Computer Courses for Kids, Touch Typing Practice, Coding Program, Generative AI for Students, Microsoft Excel/PowerPoint Training, Cyber Safety Hygiene, Google Workspace, Modern Digital Productivity

---

## Digital Skills Options Comparison (Priority: 0.85)

SkillNest provides side-by-side analytical comparisons to help parents evaluate various computer education models and curriculums:

- [Compare Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/compare/): Analytical framework comparing coding, practical digital literacy, online cohorts, and traditional offline learning centers.
- [Coding vs Digital Skills](https://skillnest.co.in/compare/coding-vs-digital-skills/): Compares logic-focused programming (Scratch/Python) with immediate-use productivity skills (MS Office/AI/typing).
- [AI vs Coding](https://skillnest.co.in/compare/ai-vs-coding/): Clarifies learning suitability, ease of adoption, and sequencing between prompt-engineered generative AI and logic-based programming.
- [Online vs Offline Learning](https://skillnest.co.in/compare/online-vs-offline-learning/): Evaluates batch sizes, scheduling, instructor quality, and commute factors between live digital classrooms and neighborhood institutes.
- [SkillNest vs Traditional Classes](https://skillnest.co.in/compare/skillnest-vs-traditional-computer-classes/): Direct comparison of SkillNest's modern project-driven NEP 2020 curriculum with generic theory-heavy offline computer coaching centers.
- [Group vs 1-to-1 Learning](https://skillnest.co.in/compare/group-vs-1-to-1-learning/): Compares learning technical skills in interactive small group cohorts vs individual private tutoring.
- [Excel vs AI Tools](https://skillnest.co.in/compare/excel-vs-ai-tools/): Compares structural variables and formulas in spreadsheets vs generative prompts for learning computational data structures.

**Topics covered:** Computer Education Comparisons, Coding vs Digital Literacy, AI vs Coding for Students, Online Computer Classes vs Offline Centers, SkillNest Comparison, Tech Education India, NEP 2020 Computer Studies

---

## Interactive Tools & Calculators (Priority: 0.85)

SkillNest offers interactive web utilities designed to help parents and students benchmark performance, assess digital readiness, and evaluate productivity gains:

- [Tools Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/tools/): Directory index of all live digital diagnostic widgets, typing testers, and AI builders.
- [Typing Speed Test](https://skillnest.co.in/tools/typing-speed-test/): Live interactive touch typing tester with standard prompts, character match counters, and instant WPM/accuracy reports.
- [Password Strength Checker](https://skillnest.co.in/tools/password-strength-checker/): Secure client-side cyber safety tool analyzing complexity requirements and potential crack times.
- [AI Prompt Generator](https://skillnest.co.in/tools/ai-prompt-generator/): Template prompt builder customizable by subject area, grade levels, and learning goals.
- [Digital Readiness Quiz](https://skillnest.co.in/tools/digital-readiness-quiz/): 5-question multi-step quiz mapping your child's skill levels to recommended paths.
- [Productivity Calculator](https://skillnest.co.in/tools/productivity-calculator/): Calculates weekly student hours saved by learning typing, formatting, and spreadsheet automation.

**Topics covered:** Interactive Tools, Student Benchmarking, Typing Speed Test, Password Strength Checker, AI Prompt Generator, Digital Readiness Quiz, Productivity Calculator, Kid Tech Assessment

---

## Parent Hub Guides (Priority: 0.85)

SkillNest provides an authoritative parent-focused content ecosystem supporting kids' digital literacy and AI learning:

- [Parent Hub Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/): Comprehensive directory for parent-focused digital guides and resources.
- [Screen Time Guide](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/screen-time-guide/): Expert advice on establishing healthy tech habits and balance for kids.
- [AI Safety for Kids](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/ai-safety-for-kids/): Practical monitoring tips and safety rules for kids using AI tools.
- [Digital Parenting](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/digital-parenting/): A unified modern framework for managing device access, behavior, and healthy tech integration.
- [Internet Safety](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/internet-safety/): Cyber safety essentials, safe browsing, and social media guidance.
- [Future Skills Guide](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/future-skills-guide/): Outlines career-readiness, digital productivity, and AI literacy skills.
- [Learning Tips](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/learning-tips/): Explores cognitive science basics and strategies to improve student motivation.

**Topics covered:** Parent Guides, Digital Parenting, Screen Time Management, AI Safety for Kids, Internet Safety, Future Skills Education, Parent Learning Support

---

## Educational Resources & Digital Skill Hub (Priority: 0.85)

SkillNest provides a comprehensive repository of free toolkits, worksheets, and study guides for students and parents:

- [Resources Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/): Central hub for kids-safe AI tools, worksheets, parent guides, typing practice, mini-courses, and CBSE resources.
- [AI Tools Guide](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/ai-tools/): Curated educational AI applications (Scratch, ChatGPT, Canva) with safety rules for school students.
- [Typing Practice Guide](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/typing-practice/): Correct home-row techniques, ergonomics posture, daily practice schedules, and printable speed charts.
- [Printable Worksheets](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/worksheets/): Downloadable MS Word, Excel columns, PowerPoint slides, Scratch block coding, and cyber safety threats checklists.
- [Parent Guides Index](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/parent-guides/): Direct access to guidebooks on screen limits, AI monitoring controls, digital agreements, and study environments.
- [Digital Skills Checklist](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/digital-skills-checklist/): Ultimate tech checklist covering keyboarding speed, file structures, spreadsheets formulas, and block logic.
- [Cyber Safety Guide](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/cyber-safety-guide/): Internet safety guide covering passwords safety, phishing emails, private search filters, and reporting scams.
- [Free Mini Courses](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/free-mini-courses/): Bite-sized video tutorials and text guides covering computer basics, spreadsheets formulas, slide formatting, and prompts.
- [AI Prompt Guide](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/ai-prompt-guide/): ChatGPT prompt engineering templates designed for school students using Role, Task, Context, Output constraints.
- [CBSE Resources Discovery](https://skillnest.co.in/resources/cbse-resources/): Navigation hub consolidating links to Class 1-12 NCERT official textbooks and exemplar studies.

**Topics covered:** Educational Resources, Kids-Safe AI Tools, Touch Typing Practice, Computer Worksheets, Digital Parenting Guides, Digital Skills Checklist, Cyber Safety for Kids, Free Computer Mini Courses, ChatGPT Prompts for Students, CBSE NCERT Textbooks Download

---

- [Parent Blog Hub](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/): Central index of articles and guides for parents on coding, AI, and digital skills.
- [Student Projects Overview](https://skillnest.co.in/projects/): Showcases live games, presentations, and digital portfolios built by students.
- [Coding & Games Projects](https://skillnest.co.in/projects/coding-and-games/): MIT Scratch and basic programming projects.
- [Student Presentations](https://skillnest.co.in/projects/student-presentations/): PowerPoint presentations and slide designs.
- [AI Projects](https://skillnest.co.in/projects/ai-projects/): Prompt engineering and AI workflows.
- [Certificates](https://skillnest.co.in/projects/certificates/): Program completion recognitions.
- [Excel Projects](https://skillnest.co.in/projects/excel-projects/): Math, marksheets, and budget calculation spreadsheets.
- [Portfolio Projects](https://skillnest.co.in/projects/portfolio-projects/): Dynamic multi-skill digital student portfolios.
- [Parent Testimonials](https://skillnest.co.in/parent-hub/testimonials/): Reviews and verified feedback from parents of enrolled students.
- [School Partnerships (B2B)](https://skillnest.co.in/schools/): Information for school administrators seeking to integrate SkillNest's curriculum.

---

## Parent Resources & Blog Articles (Priority: 0.7)

- [Why Kids Should Learn AI Early](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/ai-for-kids/): Discusses the role of AI in middle school education and how to explain it to kids.
- [Essential Digital Skills Every Middle School Student Needs](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/digital-skills/): Discover the 5 foundational digital skills Class 6-8 students need.
- [Productive Screen Time Ideas for Kids](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/screen-time/): Actionable tips for shifting technology habits from passive consumption to active creation.
- [How to Build Productivity Skills in Kids with Technology](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/productivity-skills/): Spreadsheets, document layout, and email organization tips for academic work.
- [Why Coding for Kids Matters: A Parent's Complete Guide](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/coding-for-kids/): Scratch vs Python, logic loops, variables, and coordinate alignment guides.
- [Internet Safety for Kids: What Every Parent Must Know](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/internet-safety/): Active device agreements, safe search engines, browser cookies, and privacy controls.
- [How Digital Skills Are Transforming School Education in India](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/school-education/): NEP 2020 computer curriculum mandates and how parents can bridge the IT lab gap.
- [STEM Learning for Kids: Building Tomorrow's Problem Solvers](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/stem-learning/): Integrates geometry math paths with MIT Scratch animations and Excel charts.
- [AI vs Coding for Kids: Which Should Your Child Learn First?](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/ai-vs-coding/): Comparative guide to sequence logical block structures versus generative prompt literacy.
- [Coding vs Digital Skills: What's the Difference and Why Both Matter](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/coding-vs-digital-skills/): Foundational keyboarding/office productivity excellence versus loop/conditional program scripts.
- [Why Coding Skills Matter for Students in Ladakh](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/coding-ladakh/): Explores how digital skills and coding empower youth in Leh and Kargil.
- [Digital Education Growth in Jammu & Kashmir](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/digital-education-jk/): Covers transition of Srinagar and Jammu students to interactive online STEM learning.
- [Modernizing Computer Education in Himachal Pradesh](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/education-himachal/): Supplementary practical STEM classes in HP's high-literacy environment.
- [Best AI Learning Opportunities for Kids in Punjab](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/ai-learning-punjab/): Guides Punjab parents on why typing speed, AI tools, and logic strengthen academic portfolios.
- [Coding and STEM Learning Hubs for Sikkim Students](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/stem-sikkim/): Spotlights Gangtok's growing digital initiatives and coding pathways.
- [Empowering Arunachal Youth with Computational Thinking](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/computational-thinking-arunachal/): High-impact problem-solving and Coding Program in remote North-East communities.
- [How Excel Helps Middle School Students Learn Data](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/excel-for-students/): Visual spreadsheet exercises for school science and math calculations.
- [Essential Digital Skills Schools Don't Teach](https://skillnest.co.in/blog/skills-schools-miss/): Focuses on the gap in traditional CBSE IT syllabi.

---
